# MangaAura
> La plataforma de manga con IA para leer, crear y crowdfundear capítulos.

## Explore
- /explore: Discover manga by genre, popularity, and latest updates.
- /rankings: Top ranked manga and readers.
- /manga/[slug]: Individual manga series pages with chapters.
- /reader/[slug]: Manga chapter reader.

## Community
- /community: Community hub with forums and clans.
- /events: Seasonal events and competitions.
- /news: Platform news and updates.

## For Creators
- /creator/dashboard: Creator analytics and management.
- /creator/upload: Upload new manga chapters.

## Key Features
- AI-powered manga discovery and recommendations
- Crowdfunding for chapters using Aura currency
- Gamification with XP, achievements, and clans
- Offline reading support
- Creator revenue sharing
